action.content: Can you write a poem about the pros and cons of playing a lot of video games? Please make sure it's at least 40 sentences long (don't forget to add punctuations). You must highlight some words or phrases in your response, like *highlighted phrase*.
action.label: context

action.content:
The screen glows bright in the quiet room.
*Digital worlds* await your command.
You can travel to lands far away.
*Fantasy realms* are just a click away.
Heroes rise from the pixelated dust.
*Epic battles* test your skill and trust.
Friends gather online to fight as one.
*Global connections* are easily spun.
Puzzles challenge the mind to think.
*Strategic plans* make the victory link.
Stress melts away in the game's embrace.
*A safe escape* from a chaotic place.
Reflexes sharpen with every match.
*Quick decisions* become a natural act.
Learning languages through foreign quests.
*New cultures* are put to the tests.
But the clock ticks on without a sound.
*Lost hours* are never to be found.
The sun sets while you stay inside.
*Real life* begins to fade and hide.
Eyes grow tired from the glowing light.
*Screen fatigue* brings a heavy sight.
The chair feels hard against the back.
*Physical pain* starts to come back.
Social skills may start to rust.
*Face-to-face* talks feel like a must.
Sleep is pushed to the morning gray.
*Restless nights* keep the mind at bay.
Food is forgotten on the plate.
*Unhealthy habits* seal your fate.
Money spent on skins and loot.
*Virtual goods* are a costly root.
Frustration builds when you lose the fight.
*Anger spikes* in the dead of night.
Reality seems dull and gray.
*The real world* feels far away.
Addiction whispers in the ear.
*Compulsive play* makes the path unclear.
Schoolwork slips beneath the radar.
*Grades drop* like a heavy ladder.
Family time gets cut in half.
*Broken bonds* cause a silent laugh.
Yet the joy is real and deep.
*Pure fun* is something we keep.
Balance is the key to hold.
*Moderate play* makes the story gold.
Choose your time with care and thought.
*Healthy limits* are what you ought.
Enjoy the game but do not stay.
*Life outside* has much to say.
The pros and cons are clear to see.
*Wisdom lies* in what you choose to be.
So play your games with open eyes.
*True balance* is the grand prize.
action.label: response
